title: Cobblemon Nuzlocke Mode
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ## Cobblemon Nuzlocke Adds Nuzlocke challenge rules to Cobblemon. Configure your run when you first join a world. ### Features: - Permadeath - Fainted Pokémon are automatically released - One catch per biome - Only catch the first encounter in each biome - One spawn per biome(instance) - Only one spawn per biome - No duplicates - Can't catch species you already own - No healing - Disables Pokémon Center healing - Shiny clause - Shinies are always catchable regardless of rules - Catch cooldown - Optional timer between catches (0-60 min) Commands: /nuzlocke status /nuzlocke config Toggle any combination of rules to customize your challenge. Settings are per-player and persist across sessions.
